tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Spring jerkbait: work it on slack line — never go the same direction twice. Pop forward, pause, point rod tip back at bait to maintain slack, repeat. The pause is deadly — bait just suspends like a dying shad and fish can't resist. Biggest mistake is just steadily jerking and reeling back.'

knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Jerkbait setup: high-speed reel (not for pulling bait, just picking up slack fast). All-graphite rod with snappy tip for sharp darting action, even at end of long casts in wind. Fluorocarbon line — lighter line runs deeper, heavier stays shallow. Line choice controls bait depth with precision.'
